/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libamr_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libamr_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/amr_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/amr_msgs/msg/_location_s.c.o CMakeFiles/amr_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/amr_msgs/msg/_status_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/cayo-sousa/ws_ld90_sim/build/amr_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libamr_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libamr_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
